span.p: PaaS services - SQL, Cosmos, Service Bus

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Azure bill too high or alert fired

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Check diagnostic settings - disable verbose logs
use Basic Logs tier for high-volume low-query tables
set sampling on App Insights

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stop or delete idle resources
auto-shutdown for dev/test

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rightsize via Advisor recommendations
then buy savings plan or RI

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Buy Azure savings plan or Reserved Instance
after 30 days of baseline data

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Review lifecycle policies - move cool/archive
delete orphaned disks and snapshots

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Review data transfer patterns
CDN caching effectiveness + region colocations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Check DTU/RU provisioning vs actual use
serverless or autoscale tiers where supported
